items.title: Pope criticises 'tyrants' who spend billions on wars after Trump spat
items.dek: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.
items.body: The comments follow a high-profile spat with US President Donald Trump, who called the Pope weak on crime.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Ex-keeper Manninger dies after car hit by train
items.dek: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies at the age of 48 after his car is struck by a train.
items.body: Former Arsenal goalkeeper Alex Manninger dies at the age of 48 after his car is struck by a train.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Doncic, Cunningham eligible for season awards
items.dek: Luka Doncic and Cade Cunningham are eligible for season honors after their 65-game challenge was approved, while Anthony Edwards' challenege was declined.
items.body: Luka Doncic and Cade Cunningham are eligible for season honors after their 65-game challenge was approved, while Anthony Edwards' challenege was declined.
items.author: IriLine Desk
